catalog_metadata.description: Universal Monetization Protocol (UMP) Event Catalog - Comprehensive event definitions for all protocol layers

events.description: A new value unit has been created in the system

vu_id.description: Unique identifier of the value unit

events.description: A value unit has been updated

changes.description: Changed fields and their new values

events.description: A value unit has been marked as deprecated

replacement_vu_id.description: ID of replacement value unit if applicable

events.description: A new entity (provider, consumer, intermediary) has been created
An entity's information has been updated
An entity's status has changed (e.g., ACTIVE to SUSPENDED)
A new contract has been created
A contract has been signed and activated
A contract has been amended
A contract has been renewed
events.triggered_by: Automatic renewal or manual renewal action

events.description: A contract has been terminated
A new pricing rule has been created
A pricing rule has been activated
A pricing rule has been suspended
A pricing rule has been deprecated
An offer has been published
An offer has been withdrawn from availability

affected_contracts.description: Number of contracts affected by withdrawal

events.description: The service catalog has been updated
A new quote has been created
A quote has been approved and converted to contract
A quote has expired without approval
A usage event has been received by the metering system
A usage event has passed validation checks
A usage event has been rated according to pricing rules
A usage event has been rejected
A meter has reached a configured threshold
A meter has been reset
events.triggered_by: Manual reset or billing period reset

events.description: An invoice has been generated
An invoice has been sent to the consumer
An invoice has been fully paid
An invoice has become overdue
An invoice has been voided

replacement_invoice_id.description: ID of replacement invoice if issued

events.description: A payment has been received
A payment has been allocated to invoices
A payment has been reversed
A payment processing attempt has failed
A settlement has been calculated

line_items.description: Number of line items in settlement

events.description: A settlement has been approved
A settlement has been executed
A settlement has been reconciled
A settlement has been disputed
Revenue has been recognized
An intelligent agent has generated a recommendation
An intelligent agent has executed an action
An intelligent agent has triggered an escalation
An intelligence insight has been generated
A new policy has been created
A policy violation has been detected
An exception to a policy has been approved
An anomaly has been detected in audit trail
